title: If I Die, It'll Be of Joy
original_title: Si je meurs, ce sera de joie
overview: In a world that underestimates the power of the elderly, Micheline, Francis and Yves lead a group of older activists on a daring journey to revolutionize senior living, challenging stereotypes and judgments while redefining the notions of sex, love, and aging.

trailers.title: IF I DIE, IT LL BE OF JOY  | Alexis Taillant | Tráiler | FIRE!! 2025
